faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.metaDescription: Find answers to frequently asked questions about SkillLinkup. Learn how our freelance marketplace works for both clients and freelancers.
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about using SkillLinkup as a buyer or seller
faq.cantFind: Can't find what you're looking for? Contact our support team.
faq.pay1Q: What methods of payment are supported?
faq.pay1A: SkillLinkup supports payments through Stripe, which accepts all major credit and debit cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express), as well as Apple Pay, Google Pay, and iDEAL for Dutch users. All payments are processed securely through Stripe Connect.
faq.pay2Q: How does SkillLinkup protect my payment?
faq.pay2A: We use an escrow system — your payment is held securely until the work is delivered and approved. If a dispute arises, our resolution process ensures both parties are treated fairly. Funds are only released to the freelancer once you confirm satisfaction.
faq.pay3Q: What are the fees for using SkillLinkup?
faq.pay3A: SkillLinkup charges a transparent 3.5% fee from both the buyer and the seller per transaction — that's it. No hidden fees, no monthly subscriptions, no upsells. You can see the full breakdown on our pricing page.
faq.pay4A: Once the client approves the delivered work, the funds are released to the freelancer's Stripe Connect account. From there, payouts to your bank account typically arrive within 2-7 business days depending on your country and bank.
faq.pay5A: If the work hasn't started yet, you can cancel the order for a full refund. If work is in progress or delivered, you can open a dispute through our resolution center. Refunds are handled case-by-case based on our terms of service.
faq.start1Q: How do I create an account?
faq.start1A: Click "Join" in the top navigation and sign up with your email address or Google account. Once registered, you can browse services, hire freelancers, or set up your own seller profile to start offering your skills.
faq.start2Q: How do I hire a freelancer?
faq.start2A: Browse or search for services in our marketplace. Once you find a service you like, click on it to see details, reviews, and pricing. You can then place an order directly or message the freelancer first to discuss your requirements.
faq.start3Q: How do I start selling on SkillLinkup?
faq.start3A: After creating your account, go to your dashboard and click "Become a Seller." Complete your profile, set up your Stripe account for payments, and create your first gig. Your service will be visible in our marketplace once published.
faq.start4Q: What is the difference between online and local services?
faq.start4A: Online services are delivered remotely — think web development, graphic design, or content writing. Local services are performed on-site in your area — like home repairs, cleaning, or photography. You can find both types on SkillLinkup.
faq.start5A: You can reach us via the contact page or email us directly at info@skilllinkup.com. We typically respond within 24 hours on business days.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.metaDescription: SkillLinkup charges just 3.5% for buyers and 3.5% for sellers per transaction. No subscriptions, no hidden fees. Free to join.
pricing.heroSubtitle: No subscriptions. No monthly fees. Just 3.5% each for buyer and seller.
pricing.feeExplainer: buyer fee + seller fee per completed order
pricing.feeIncluded: Payment processing costs included — no extra charges
pricing.step1Desc: Create your account and profile at no cost. No credit card required.
pricing.step2Desc: Find projects, deliver great work, and get paid through our secure escrow system.
pricing.step3Desc: We only take a 3.5% fee from each side when the order is completed.
pricing.faq1Q: Is it really free to sign up?
pricing.faq1A: Yes. Creating an account, setting up your profile, and browsing projects is completely free for both freelancers and clients.
pricing.faq2Q: When do I pay the fee?
pricing.faq2A: The 3.5% seller fee is automatically deducted from the freelancer's earnings when the payment is released from escrow. The 3.5% buyer fee is added at checkout.
pricing.faq3A: No. The 3.5% on each side is the only fee we charge. Payment processing costs (Stripe) are included — we cover those. There are no listing fees, subscription fees, or withdrawal fees.
pricing.faq4A: Buyers pay the listed price plus a small 3.5% service fee. For example, on a €100 order the buyer pays €103.50.
pricing.faq5Q: Why is the fee so low?
pricing.faq5A: We believe freelancers should keep more of what they earn. As a lean platform, we can offer competitive rates while still providing secure payments and quality support.

becomeSeller.title: Become a Seller
becomeSeller.subtitle: Join thousands of freelancers earning on SkillLinkup
becomeSeller.metaDescription: Start selling your freelance services on SkillLinkup. Offer digital services online, get local leads, or find employment opportunities.
becomeSeller.heroSubtitle: Join thousands of freelancers and craftsmen on SkillLinkup. Offer your services online, get local leads, or find your next opportunity.
becomeSeller.threeWaysSubtitle: Choose one or combine all three. Your profile, your rules.
becomeSeller.onlineDesc: Create gig packages for design, development, marketing and more. Set your own prices and deliver remotely to clients worldwide.
becomeSeller.localDesc: Receive quote requests from homeowners in your area. Buy credits to claim leads and connect directly with clients.
becomeSeller.localF1: Pay only for leads you want
becomeSeller.jobsDesc: Browse job openings from companies looking for your skills. Apply directly and find your next career opportunity.
becomeSeller.stepsSubtitle: Three simple steps to start earning on SkillLinkup.
becomeSeller.step1Desc: Sign up for free and showcase your skills, experience, and portfolio. Add your location for local work.
becomeSeller.step2Desc: Clients find you through search, or browse open projects and quote requests to find work that fits.
becomeSeller.step3Desc: Get paid through our secure payment system. Online orders use escrow, local leads use our credit system.
becomeSeller.whySubtitle: Everything you need to grow your freelance business, in one place.
becomeSeller.benefitSecureText: Escrow protection for online orders. Your money is safe until work is approved.
becomeSeller.benefitFeesText: Competitive platform fees from 10-15%. Keep more of what you earn.
becomeSeller.benefitReputationText: Collect reviews, earn verification badges, and stand out from the crowd.
becomeSeller.benefitLocalText: Work from anywhere or serve clients in your area. You choose.
becomeSeller.benefitMessageText: Communicate directly with clients through our built-in messaging system.
becomeSeller.benefitAnalyticsText: Track your orders, earnings, and performance from one dashboard.
becomeSeller.ctaSubtitle: Join SkillLinkup today — it's free to create your profile.
becomeSeller.faqSubtitle: Everything you need to know before getting started.
becomeSeller.faq1A: Yes, creating a freelancer profile is completely free. For online services, we charge a small platform fee (10-15%) only when you make a sale. For local leads, you buy credits to claim the leads you want.
becomeSeller.faq2Q: How do I get paid for online services?
becomeSeller.faq2A: Payments are held in escrow until the client approves your delivery. Once approved, funds are released to your Stripe account. We support bank transfers in most countries.
becomeSeller.faq3Q: How does the local lead system work?
becomeSeller.faq3A: Homeowners post quote requests for local services. You buy credits and use them to claim leads that match your skills and area. Once claimed, you get the client's contact details to reach out directly.
becomeSeller.faq4Q: Can I offer both online and local services?
becomeSeller.faq4A: Absolutely! Your profile can be set to remote, local, or hybrid. You'll appear in the relevant marketplace based on your settings.
becomeSeller.faq5Q: How long does it take to set up?
becomeSeller.faq5A: You can create your profile and start browsing opportunities in under 5 minutes. Add your skills, set your rates, and you're ready to go.
